content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, atom index 7 (C) is covalently connected to the following neighbor atoms:

- Atom index 6 (element: C)
- Atom index 8 (element: C)
- Atom index 14 (element: O)

The geomconf_index is 2977.

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 7 (element: C). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
